name.description: Full name of the person submitting the contact form.

email.description: Email address used to contact the lead back.

phone.description: Optional phone number for quick callbacks.

company.description: Company or organization the lead is associated with.

country.description: Country where the machine would be installed or shipped.

interest.description: Type of product or service the lead is interested in.

message.description: Detailed message including specifications, sheet sizes, or use case.

user_id.description: Reference to the linked user (CRM) record.
